creator: dweimer@dweimer.net
text: Fails to build when using security/openssl-devel, its looking for /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.9. However when the newer openssl-devel (currently openssl 1.10f) is installed there is a /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.10 linked to /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so I worked around it by manually created a /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.9 linked to /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so and it has built fine.
